movie.actors: Wilford Brimley, Warwick Davis, Aubree Miller, Siân Phillips
movie.plot: Marauders raid the Ewok village and steal a power supply they believe to be magical. Wicket helps Cindel escape the evil witch Charal, and they befriend a hermit who may help them save the village.
movie.title: Ewoks: The Battle for Endor
movie.writer: Ken Wheat (screenplay), Jim Wheat (screenplay), George Lucas (story)
